parsed.explanation: Fixed mismatched tag (opened as PRICE but closed as PRIZE, changed to consistent PRIZE). Corrected two instances of mangled encoding (√ü replaced with ß for Paßions and Hauß). Replaced separator artifact (√†) with † for sensible rendering; no additional tags added as mixed content was valid.
